Title: [TP-001] Landing Page Layout Audit
Description: Verify hero section, CTAs, footer links, mobile layout, and dark mode on /. Covers unauthenticated and authenticated (role-based) views.

Title: [TP-002] Login Page Layout Audit
Description: Verify form fields, demo credentials section, validation errors, role-based redirect after login, and navbar hidden state.

Title: [TP-003] Register Page Layout Audit
Description: Verify role selector, tradie-specific conditional fields, validation, registration success redirect, and navbar hidden state.

Title: [TP-004] How It Works Page Layout Audit
Description: Verify step-by-step sections, images/icons, CTA buttons, and mobile single-column layout.

Title: [TP-005] Emergency Page Layout Audit
Description: Verify pricing card, Stripe CTA, membership badge for active members, and mobile layout.

Title: [TP-006] For Tradies Page Layout Audit
Description: Verify hero, value propositions, Sign Up CTA, and mobile single-column layout.

Title: [TP-007] Categories Page Layout Audit
Description: Verify category grid, icons/images, click behaviour, and mobile grid collapse.

Title: [TP-008] About / Careers / Partner Pages Layout Audit
Description: Verify content, images, forms/CTAs, and mobile layout for three informational pages.

Title: [TP-009] 404 Not Found Page Layout Audit
Description: Verify 404 renders (not blank), Go Home CTA, and navbar presence.

Title: [TP-010] Navbar Layout & Behaviour Audit
Description: Verify role-specific links, notification badge, theme toggle, mobile hamburger menu, sign out, and hidden state on auth pages.

Title: [TP-011] Homeowner Dashboard Layout Audit
Description: Verify summary stats, recent jobs, Post a Job CTA, mobile stacking, and dark mode.

Title: [TP-012] Post Job Form Layout Audit
Description: Verify multi-step wizard, category dropdown, AI assist, photo upload, suburb autocomplete, urgency selector, validation, and mobile usability.

Title: [TP-013] Jobs List Layout Audit
Description: Verify role-filtered lists, status filters, empty state, job card links, and mobile single-column layout.

Title: [TP-014] Job Detail Layout Audit
Description: Verify metadata, photo gallery, claim CTA, lead cost deduction, claim list, accept claim flow, map, and mobile stacking.

Title: [TP-015] Find Tradies Layout Audit
Description: Verify tradie grid, category/location filters, rating sort, empty state, and mobile layout.

Title: [TP-016] Tradie Dashboard Layout Audit
Description: Verify wallet balance, welcome grant, available jobs, active claims, earnings summary, and mobile layout.

Title: [TP-017] Credits Page Layout Audit
Description: Verify three credit packages, wallet balance display, transaction history, Stripe trigger, access control, and mobile layout.

Title: [TP-018] Admin Dashboard Layout Audit
Description: Verify user management table, suspend/activate, job moderation, credit system panel, access control, and mobile horizontal scroll.

Title: [TP-019] Tradie Profile Admin View Layout Audit
Description: Verify admin access to /tradies/:id, profile fields, and redirect for non-admin users.

Title: [TP-020] Messages List Layout Audit
Description: Verify conversation cards, unread highlight, empty state, navigation, and mobile tap targets.

Title: [TP-021] Message Thread Layout Audit
Description: Verify message history order, sender alignment, send-and-clear, 5s poll, job context card, and mobile chat UI.

Title: [TP-022] Profile Edit Layout Audit
Description: Verify avatar upload, editable fields, role-specific field visibility, save confirmation, and mobile form layout.

Title: [TP-023] Notifications Layout Audit
Description: Verify notification list, unread highlight, mark-as-read, mark-all-read, empty state, and mobile tap targets.

Title: [TP-024] Responsive Design — Cross-Page Audit
Description: Verify no horizontal scroll on any page at 375px/768px, table scrolling within containers, 44px tap targets, and grid breakpoint transitions.

Title: [TP-025] Dark / Light Mode — Cross-Page Audit
Description: Verify theme toggle persistence, text contrast ≥ 4.5:1, icon visibility, form input styling, and toast readability in both modes.

Title: [TP-026] Role-Based Access Control Audit
Description: Verify all redirect rules: unauthenticated to login, cross-role dashboard access, homeowner to credits, non-admin to admin/tradie-profile.

Title: [TP-027] Accessibility Audit
Description: Verify alt attributes, form label associations, keyboard tab order, modal focus trap, aria-describedby on errors, and non-colour state indicators.
